ddls:
CREATE TABLE "variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "anno_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the annotation associated with the variant */,
  "gene" TEXT /* Gene associated with the variant */,
  "transcript" TEXT /* Transcript associated with the variant */,
  "is_exonic" INTEGER /* Whether the variant is exonic */,
  "is_coding" INTEGER /* Whether the variant is coding */,
  "is_splicing" INTEGER /* Whether the variant affects splicing */,
  "is_lof" INTEGER /* Whether the variant is a loss-of-function */,
  "variant_type" TEXT /* Type of the variant (e.g., SNP, indel, CNV) */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome on which the variant is located */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the variant */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference allele of the variant */,
  "alternate" TEXT /* Alternate allele of the variant */,
  "variant_class" TEXT /* Classification of the variant (e.g., benign, likely benign, pathogenic) */,
  "clinical_significance" TEXT /* Clinical significance of the variant (e.g., disease associated, not disease associated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome on which the gene is located */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the gene */,
  "gene_type" TEXT /* Type of the gene (e.g., protein-coding, non-coding) */,
  "gene_status" TEXT /* Status of the gene (e.g., known, novel) */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcripts" (
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcript */,
  "transcript_name" TEXT /* Name of the transcript */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene associated with the transcript */,
  "biotype" TEXT /* Biotype of the transcript (e.g., protein_coding) */,
  "transcript_description" TEXT /* Description of the transcript */,
  "transcript_status" TEXT /* Status of the transcript (e.g., known, novel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact prediction */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the variant associated with the impact prediction */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Predicted impact of the variant */,
  "impact_so" TEXT /* Predicted impact of the variant (SO term) */,
  "impact_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the predicted impact */,
  "polyphen_pred" TEXT /* PolyPhen prediction for the variant */,
  "polyphen_score" REAL /* PolyPhen score for the variant */,
  "sift_pred" TEXT /* SIFT prediction for the variant */,
  "sift_score" REAL /* SIFT score for the variant */,
  "consequence" TEXT /* Consequence of the variant (e.g., missense, frameshift) */,
  "codon_change" TEXT /* Codon change caused by the variant */,
  "amino_acid_change" TEXT /* Amino acid change caused by the variant */,
  "protein_position" INTEGER /* Position of the amino acid change in the protein */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_impact_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polyphen" (
  "polyphen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PolyPhen prediction */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the variant associated with the PolyPhen prediction */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* PolyPhen prediction for the variant */,
  "score" REAL /* PolyPhen score for the variant */,
  "pph2_prob" REAL /* pPh2 probability */,
  "pph2_class" TEXT /* pPh2 class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("polyphen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polyphen_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sift" (
  "sift_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SIFT prediction */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the variant associated with the SIFT prediction */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* SIFT prediction for the variant */,
  "score" REAL /* SIFT score for the variant */,
  "median_info" REAL /* Median conservation information */,
  "median_pred" TEXT /* Median prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sift_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sift_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the variant */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the variant was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_access_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of the comment (e.g., note, question, answer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_comments_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant being tagged */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Text of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_tags_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_external_ids" (
  "external_id" TEXT /* External ID of the variant */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant */,
  "external_db" TEXT /* Name of the external database */,
  "external_id_type" TEXT /* Type of the external ID (e.g., dbSNP, ClinVar) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("external_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_external_ids_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant associated with the publication */,
  "pmid" INTEGER /* PubMed ID of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was published */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal in which the publication was published */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_publications_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_functional_annotations" (
  "functional_annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each functional annotation */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant associated with the functional annotation */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Text of the functional annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of the functional annotation (e.g., gene expression, protein function) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("functional_annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_functional_annotations_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)
